categories.name: Starters
categories.description: Traditional Indian appetizers and tandoori specialties.

items.title: Samosa
items.text: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes and green peas. Served with salad and chutney.

items.title: Samosa Chaat
items.text: Crispy samosa served with vegetables, chutneys, yogurt, chickpea crisps, and coriander.

items.title: Onion Bhaji
items.text: Golden fried onion rings seasoned with aromatic spices. Served with salad and chutney.

items.title: Chicken Tikka
items.text: Chicken pieces grilled in tandoor with aromatic Indian spices. Served with salad and mint chutney.

items.title: Paneer Tikka
items.text: Grilled Indian cottage cheese with peppers and onions in spiced yogurt marinade.

categories.name: Main Dishes
categories.description: Rich and flavorful Indian curries made with aromatic spices.

items.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.text: Creamy tomato-based curry with cashew nuts and spices. Choice of chicken.

items.title: Lamb Tikka Masala
items.text: Rich and creamy tomato curry with tender lamb pieces.

items.title: Prawn Tikka Masala
items.text: Succulent prawns cooked in creamy tomato and cashew gravy.

items.title: Butter Chicken
items.text: Tender chicken cooked in butter and tomato gravy with a blend of Indian spices.

items.title: Butter Masala with Prawns
items.text: Prawns cooked in rich tomato and butter sauce with aromatic spices.

items.title: Palak Chicken
items.text: Chicken simmered in creamy spinach sauce with Indian spices.

items.title: Palak Lamb
items.text: Tender lamb cooked in smooth spinach-based curry.

items.title: Palak Prawns
items.text: Prawns simmered in spinach gravy with Indian herbs and spices.

items.title: Laal Maas
items.text: Spicy Rajasthani lamb curry cooked with red chili and aromatic spices.

items.title: Moong Masala
items.text: Mung beans cooked with onion, tomato, and garlic in traditional Indian spices.

items.title: Sev Tomato
items.text: Sweet and spicy tomato curry topped with crispy chickpea noodles.

items.title: Daal
items.text: Creamy lentils cooked with vegetables and aromatic spices.

items.title: Daal Tadka
items.text: Lentils topped with tempered spices and red chili on ghee.

items.title: Mix Veg Kadai
items.text: Seasonal vegetables and paneer cooked in spiced tomato gravy.

items.title: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.text: Paneer cooked in creamy tomato sauce with aromatic spices.

items.title: Paneer Butter Masala
items.text: Paneer cubes cooked in buttery tomato cashew gravy.

items.title: Palak Paneer
items.text: Paneer cooked in creamy spinach sauce with Indian spices.

categories.name: Drinks
categories.description: Refreshing Indian beverages, lassis, and teas.

items.title: Mango Lassi
items.text: Creamy yogurt drink blended with ripe mango and a hint of cardamom.

items.title: Dry Fruit Lassi
items.text: Yogurt drink enriched with mixed dry fruits, cashews, and almonds.

items.title: Salt Lassi
items.text: Refreshing salty yogurt drink with light Indian spices.

items.title: Lemonade
items.text: Classic refreshing lemon drink.

items.title: Indian Lemonade
items.text: Refreshing lemonade with herbs, spices, and a hint of salt.

items.title: Indian Masala Chai
items.text: Aromatic Indian tea brewed with milk and a blend of warming spices.

items.title: Masala Black Tea
items.text: Indian black tea infused with cinnamon, cardamom, ginger, and cloves.

items.title: Espresso Single
items.text: Strong single-shot espresso.

items.title: Espresso Doppio
items.text: Double espresso for extra energy.

items.title: Americano
items.text: Espresso with hot water for a lighter taste.

items.title: Cappuccino
items.text: Espresso with steamed milk and foamed milk top.

items.title: Flat White
items.text: Smooth coffee with velvety steamed milk.

items.title: Latte
items.text: Mild espresso with steamed milk and a touch of foam.

items.title: Latte Macchiato
items.text: Layered espresso and milk with rich flavor.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Traditional Indian sweets made with love and warmth.

items.title: Gulab Jamun
items.text: Warm milk dumplings soaked in rose-cardamom sugar syrup.

items.title: Carrot Ladoo
items.text: Sweet carrot balls with cardamom, milk, and coconut flakes.
